scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && concurrently --kill-others --names "vite,electron" -c "cyan,green" "npm --prefix ../ClientApp run dev" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.publish:dotnet:win:cuda: npm run clean:backend && dotnet publish ../Heliosoph.DatumV.Web.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:GpuVariant=cuda -o ./build/backend
scripts.publish:dotnet:win:standard: npm run clean:backend && dotnet publish ../Heliosoph.DatumV.Web.csproj -c Release -r win-x64 --self-contained true -p:GpuVariant=standard -o ./build/backend
scripts.publish:dotnet:linux:cuda: npm run clean:backend && dotnet publish ../Heliosoph.DatumV.Web.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 --self-contained true -p:GpuVariant=cuda -o ./build/backend
scripts.publish:dotnet:linux:standard: npm run clean:backend && dotnet publish ../Heliosoph.DatumV.Web.csproj -c Release -r linux-x64 --self-contained true -p:GpuVariant=standard -o ./build/backend
scripts.dist:win:cuda: npm run build:clientapp && npm run publish:dotnet:win:cuda && npm run build && cross-env DATUMV_VARIANT_SUFFIX=-cuda electron-builder --win -c.publish.channel=cuda
scripts.dist:win:standard: npm run build:clientapp && npm run publish:dotnet:win:standard && npm run build && cross-env DATUMV_VARIANT_SUFFIX= electron-builder --win -c.publish.channel=standard
scripts.dist:linux:cuda: npm run build:clientapp && npm run publish:dotnet:linux:cuda && npm run build && cross-env DATUMV_VARIANT_SUFFIX=-cuda electron-builder --linux -c.publish.channel=cuda
scripts.dist:linux:standard: npm run build:clientapp && npm run publish:dotnet:linux:standard && npm run build && cross-env DATUMV_VARIANT_SUFFIX= electron-builder --linux -c.publish.channel=standard
